synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23368 Oracle Linux 8 gnome-control-center and gnome-settings-daemon bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23368
description:
gnome-settings-daemon
[3.32.0-21]
- Add icon to subman notifications
  Resolves: RHEL-5074

[3.32.0-20]
- Backport some upstream smartcard changes that make it work
  better with p11-kit
  Resolves: #1796190
- Rework how subscription-manager plugin is conditionalized so
  it doens't get built on centos 8 stream

[4.32.0-19]
- Make power-button-action default to poweroff on servers
- Resolves: #1920829

[3.32.0-18]
- Prevent automatic logout warning in greeter sessions
- Resolves: #2018606

[3.32.0-17]
- Make power-button-action respect the "nothing" action on VMs
- Resolves: #2062051

[3.32.0-16]
- Update pt_BR translations
- Resolves: #2003069

[3.32.0-15]
- Keep auto-logout working inside VMs
  Resolves: #1904139

[3.32.0-14]
- Update fr, ja, zh_CN translations
- Resolves: #1876291

[3.32.0-13]
- Add back subscription-manager plugin
  Related: #1870837

[3.32.0-12]
- Handle org.gnome.Shell.Screencast Stopped signal
  Related: #1705392
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23368

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23368.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
gnome-control-center-3.28.2-39.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
gnome-control-center-filesystem-3.28.2-39.el8_10.noarch.rpm
gnome-settings-daemon-3.32.0-21.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
gnome-control-center-3.28.2-39.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
gnome-control-center-filesystem-3.28.2-39.el8_10.noarch.rpm
gnome-settings-daemon-3.32.0-21.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/gnome-control-center-3.28.2-39.el8_10.src.rpm
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/gnome-settings-daemon-3.32.0-21.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

gnome-settings-daemon
[3.32.0-21]
- Add icon to subman notifications
  Resolves: RHEL-5074

[3.32.0-20]
- Backport some upstream smartcard changes that make it work
  better with p11-kit
  Resolves: #1796190
- Rework how subscription-manager plugin is conditionalized so
  it doens't get built on centos 8 stream

[4.32.0-19]
- Make power-button-action default to poweroff on servers
- Resolves: #1920829

[3.32.0-18]
- Prevent automatic logout warning in greeter sessions
- Resolves: #2018606

[3.32.0-17]
- Make power-button-action respect the "nothing" action on VMs
- Resolves: #2062051

[3.32.0-16]
- Update pt_BR translations
- Resolves: #2003069

[3.32.0-15]
- Keep auto-logout working inside VMs
  Resolves: #1904139

[3.32.0-14]
- Update fr, ja, zh_CN translations
- Resolves: #1876291

[3.32.0-13]
- Add back subscription-manager plugin
  Related: #1870837

[3.32.0-12]
- Handle org.gnome.Shell.Screencast Stopped signal
  Related: #1705392
